name: Histamine Handling
description: Exploratory panel for histamine breakdown via DAO (AOC1) and HNMT. Useful for pattern-spotting, not for diagnosing histamine intolerance or mast-cell disease.

snps.description: Coding variant in the DAO enzyme. The T allele has been associated with reduced DAO activity in human association studies.

CC.note: No reduced-DAO allele at this site.

CT.note: One reduced-DAO allele. Histamine clearance may be a bit less resilient, especially with high histamine load or gut inflammation.

TT.note: Two reduced-DAO alleles at this site. This is a stronger genetic signal for lower DAO-mediated histamine breakdown.

snps.description: DAO coding variant associated with lower enzyme activity in AOC1 deficiency studies.

CC.note: No reduced-DAO allele at this site.

CT.note: One reduced-DAO allele. On its own this is usually a mild signal, but it matters more when other DAO variants stack up.

TT.note: Two reduced-DAO alleles at this site. Stronger genetic signal for lower DAO function.

snps.description: DAO coding variant associated with reduced histamine-degrading capacity in AOC1 studies.

CC.note: No reduced-DAO allele at this site.

CG.note: One reduced-DAO allele. This can contribute to lower histamine tolerance when paired with other DAO variants.

GG.note: Two reduced-DAO alleles at this site. Stronger signal for lower DAO-mediated histamine breakdown.

snps.description: Promoter-region variant associated with lower AOC1 transcription and lower DAO activity.

GG.note: No lower-expression DAO allele at this site.

GT.note: One lower-expression allele. DAO reserve may be somewhat lower under stressors like alcohol, infection, or gut irritation.

TT.note: Two lower-expression alleles at this site. Stronger signal for reduced DAO expression.

snps.description: Functional HNMT variant. The T allele lowers histamine N-methyltransferase activity and can reduce intracellular histamine clearance.

CC.note: Standard HNMT activity at this site.

CT.note: One lower-activity HNMT allele. Histamine breakdown outside the gut may be somewhat slower.

TT.note: Two lower-activity HNMT alleles. Stronger signal for reduced HNMT-mediated histamine breakdown.
